extracted.full_content:
Krishna Chauhan

Founder | Execura Staffing and Recruitment Consultancy | Connecting Businesses with Top Talent | Helping People Find Their Dream Jobs

🚀 WE ARE HIRING | Multiple Tech Opportunities | Execura

We are actively hiring for multiple exciting roles across AI, ERP, and Core Development domains. If you're looking for your next big opportunity, this is your chance to work on cutting-edge technologies and enterprise-grade systems.


🔹 1. AI Solutions Architect – Enterprise Back-End Systems

📍 Remote | 🕒 3 PM – 11 PM (IST)
💰 ₹1 LPM to ₹1.2 LPM | 🧠 15+ Years Experience

We are looking for a senior architect to lead AI-driven transformation across CRM, ERP, and iPaaS ecosystems.
✔ Work on LLMs, Agentic AI, RAG architectures
✔ Drive enterprise integrations using APIs, ETL/ELT, and event-driven systems
✔ Collaborate with stakeholders and lead large-scale AI implementations


🔹 2. WMS Flex Developer

📍 Remote | 💰 ₹75K – ₹95K/month
🧠 5–8 Years Experience | 6 Months Contract (Extendable)

Looking for a developer with strong expertise in Progress Open Edge ABL (4GL) and ERP systems.
✔ Work on FDM4 ERP application enhancements & support
✔ Develop scalable backend solutions and manage production systems
✔ Exposure to Java/Python, SQL, and Agile methodologies


🔹 3. C++ Developer (Linux, Microservices, Docker)

📍 Noida (Hybrid) | 💰 ₹55K – ₹65K/month
🧠 6–10 Years Experience

Join a high-performance team working on scalable microservices and system-level development
✔ Strong hands-on with C++, Linux, Docker
✔ Build and optimize high-performance applications
✔ Work in a modern microservices & containerized environment


✨ Why Join?
• Work on **next-gen technologies (AI/ML, Microservices, ERP systems)**
• Opportunity to contribute to **enterprise-scale projects**
• Flexible work models (Remote/Hybrid)
• Competitive compensation


📩 Interested candidates can apply now:
📧 [talent.execura@gmail.com]
📞 +91 93270 71692

👉 Tag someone who might be a great fit!

HR Intern @ Rayosys | Remote Hiring | Staff Augmentation | Connecting Companies with Skilled Developers Ready for Immediate Deployment

Rayosys is Hiring – AI Roles | Contract Opportunities

We are looking for talented AI Engineers & AI Solution Architects to build and scale next-generation AI/ML and GenAI solutions.

 Open Positions:

 AI Engineer 
Experience: 4+ Years
Skills: Python, Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning, scikit-learn / TensorFlow / PyTorch, Data Processing, Model Development & Deployment, APIs

 AI Solution Architect 
Experience: 10+ Years
Skills: AI Architecture, LLMs, RAG Pipelines, MLOps, Cloud AI (AWS/Azure/GCP), Agentic Workflows, System Design, AI Strategy & Governance

📩 How to Apply:
Share your updated resume at
sherly.seedarla@rayosys.com

 Immediate joiners preferred
 Work on cutting-edge AI & GenAI solutions
 High-impact engineering & architecture roles
 Exposure to global AI projects

If you're exploring your next opportunity — let’s connect.
